strategy.holdUntil: Hold only while VOYG thesis/catalyst justify option risk before 1/15/2027.
strategy.addWhen: No add until underlying thesis, bid/ask, IV, and catalyst timing are verified.
strategy.trimWhen: Trim if option spikes or IV/liquidity risk worsens.
strategy.exitWhen: Exit/reduce if thesis fails, catalyst timing slips, or max-loss tolerance is hit.
strategy.invalidation: No clear catalyst plus time decay/IV risk.

strategy.posture: AI power / electricity demand compounder watch
strategy.holdUntil: Hold while AI/data-center electricity-demand thesis remains intact and valuation does not outrun power/cash-flow evidence.
strategy.addWhen: Add only after pullback into defined buy zone or when power-price/contract evidence confirms upside without crowded-extension risk.
strategy.trimWhen: Trim if power/AI narrative becomes euphoric, valuation outruns earnings/cash-flow, or combined VST+CEG power exposure exceeds risk budget.
strategy.exitWhen: Exit review if data-center power thesis weakens, regulatory/merchant-power risk rises, or price breaks technical support on distribution volume.
strategy.invalidation: Power-demand upside fails to translate into durable earnings/cash-flow or position becomes duplicate CEG exposure without better risk/reward.
strategy.review: Earnings / power pricing / data-center contracts / regulatory headlines.

strategy.holdUntil: Hold only while range thesis and COIN/BTC risk tone support bounce.
strategy.addWhen: Add-watch near lower range only with crypto confirmation.
strategy.trimWhen: Scale down into upper range unless breakout is confirmed.
strategy.exitWhen: Exit/reduce below invalidation; never average down below invalidation.
strategy.invalidation: Lower support breaks with COIN/BTC weakness.
strategy.review: Daily while held; time stop 2–5 trading days.
